name: Szechuan Hot-Fried Crispy Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Top beef, cut into strips
2 Green onions, cut into 1 in. pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 2 shredded chilies, 3 crushed garlic cloves, 6 teaspoons sugar, 2 tablespoons soy sauce, and 4 tablespoons wine vinegar.
2. In a bowl, mix the eggs, salt, and cornflour until well combined.
3. Toss the beef strips in the egg mixture to coat evenly.
4. Heat oil in a wok to 350°F (175°C), or until a bread cube browns in 30 seconds.
5. Stir-fry the coated beef for 1 1/2 minutes, then remove and drain on paper towels.
6. Reheat the oil and deep-fry carrots for 1 1/2 minutes, then remove and drain on paper towels.
7. Pour off most of the oil, leaving about 1 1/2 tablespoons in the wok.
8. Reheat the remaining oil, then add green onions, chilies, and garlic. Stir-fry for about 3 seconds over heat.
9. Add sugar, soy sauce, and vinegar to the mixture; stir until combined.
10. Return the meat and carrots to the sauce; toss over heat and serve.
